basic_details.job_title: BEL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 56 Field Operation Engineer, Project Engineer Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Bharat Electronics Limited (BEL), Homeland Security and Smart City Business SBU (HLS&SCB), Bengaluru Complex
basic_details.department: Homeland Security and Smart City Business SBU (HLS&SCB), Bharat Electronics Limited
basic_details.short_information: BEL is recruiting 56 Field Operation Engineer and Project Engineer-I posts on contractual basis with BE/B.Tech/ME/M.Tech/MCA qualification, last date 08 June 2026.

important_dates.interview_date: To be intimated via registered e-mail ID after shortlisting

application_fee.details: Application fee must be paid through SBI Collect (online mode only) before submitting the application. Candidates applying for more than one post must make separate payments for each post. Fee once paid will not be refunded under any circumstances. Candidates must note the SBI Collect Reference Number generated after payment and enter it in the application form. | SBI Collect Payment Link: https://www.onlinesbi.sbi/sbicollect/icollecthome.htm?corpID=14842 - Select PSU → Bharat Electronics Ltd → Payment Category: "Field Operation Engineer for HLS SCB" or "Project Engineer-I for HLS SCB" as applicable.

age_limit.details: The upper age limit indicated is for candidates belonging to General (UR) and EWS categories, as on 01-06-2026. Age relaxation is applicable as per Government of India guidelines for reserved categories.

qualification.details: Only Indian Nationals are eligible. Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on 01-06-2026. Candidates should be willing to be posted at project sites in Delhi, Punjab, Uttar Pradesh and Madhya Pradesh and willing to travel across India.
qualification.education_qualification: ME/M.Tech/BE/B.Tech/B.Sc Engineering (4-year course) or MCA from AICTE/UGC approved college/institute or recognized university. Pass class for all categories including SC/ST/PwBD.
qualification.experience: 5 years relevant post-qualification work experience in Networking/Data Centres operations/Database administration. Required knowledge: Data networking concepts, DBMS, Firewall, AAA server, Routing protocols (OSPF, BGP), Switching protocols (STP, RSTP, VTP), EtherChannel, NTP, VLAN, Port Security, DNS, CCNA basics, IP addressing & subnetting, Linux basics.

selection_process: Written Test 85 marks (85%) Conducted for all shortlisted candidates meeting eligibility criteria.

Interview 15 marks (15%) Only candidates passing the written test are shortlisted for interview in ratio 1:10 (merit and category-wise). Interview scheduled on same day or subsequent days immediately after written test results.
Selection shall be through a Pre-Registered Walk-In Selection to be held in and around Delhi
Uttar Pradesh and Madhya Pradesh. Venue
date and time will be published on BEL's website careers section and communicated via registered e-mail to shortlisted candidates.

Final selection results will be notified on BEL's official website and offer of engagement sent to selected candidates' registered e-mail ID. A candidate not selected will receive no separate communication.

Selected candidates must produce all original documents for verification and submit proof of medical insurance at the time of joining. FOE candidates: Medical Insurance cover of Rs. 2 lakhs per annum and Life Cover Insurance of Rs. 10 lakhs per annum. Project Engineer candidates: Medical Insurance cover of Rs. 2 lakhs per annum and Life Cover Insurance of Rs. 5 lakhs per annum.
how_to_apply: Candidates shall apply online only through the Microsoft Office Form link / QR code provided on the BEL official website. Registrations received in any other format will not be considered. Candidates must first pay the application fee via SBI Collect, note the reference number, and then complete the online form. Applications that are incomplete, not legible, contain false or suppressed information, or do not meet the eligibility criteria will be summarily rejected.
Steps to Fill the Online Application:
Go through the detailed advertisement and confirm all eligibility criteria are met before proceeding.
Pay the application fee through SBI Collect at the link provided; note the SBI Collect Reference Number.
Register online using the Microsoft Office Form link / QR code available on BEL's official website for the respective post.
Fill in all mandatory fields including SBI Collect Reference Number and submit the form.
After clicking Submit, a copy of the filled application form will be sent to your registered e-mail ID.
Print the application form. Carry the printout along with 2 recent passport-size colour photographs and all required documents to the Walk-In selection venue on the intimated date.
Documents Required at the Time of Written Test / Interview / Document Verification:
SSLC/SSC/10th standard marks card as proof of date of birth
All educational certificates starting from Matriculation/Class X
ME/M.Tech/MCA/BE/B.Tech/B.Sc Engineering (4-year course) degree certificate; CGPA/credits conversion formula from university (if applicable) - mandatory, failing which candidature will be cancelled
All semester mark sheets / final consolidated mark sheet

Caste/Community/Disability/Income certificate for SC/ST/OBC(NCL)/PwBD/EWS candidates in prescribed Government of India format (OBC NCL certificate issued on or after 01.06.2025; EWS Income & Asset certificate for 2025-26)

Post-qualification experience certificate(s) from all previous and current employers; joining/appointment letter, relieving letter and, where current experience certificate is unavailable, first and latest pay slips and employee ID proof
'No Objection Certificate' for candidates working in PSUs/Government organizations
'Intimation Letter' duly signed by concerned HR for candidates currently working in BEL
Copy of SBI Collect application fee payment receipt
Any document in a language other than Hindi/English must be accompanied by a transcript attested by a gazette officer or notary
Register Online at: https://www.bel-india.in/careers/ or https://belindia.in/careers/
For queries: E-mail: [email protected] | Telephone: 080-22197933
important_instructions: THIS IS A TEMPORARY/CONTRACTUAL ENGAGEMENT, NOT REGULAR EMPLOYMENT IN BEL. Candidates engaged will not be treated as regular employees of BEL and will not be entitled to employee benefits. BEL has no obligation to offer regular employment during or after the contract period. Candidates must be willing to be posted at project sites in Delhi, Punjab, Uttar Pradesh and Madhya Pradesh and must be willing to travel across India based on project requirements. Candidates can apply for more than one post, but must submit separate applications and separate fee payments for each post. Online registration is mandatory before the closing date of 08-06-2026; candidates who have not registered will not be allowed to appear for Walk-In selections. Lateral application for the same post within BEL is not permitted and will be summarily rejected. Merely fulfilling the minimum eligibility criteria does not vest any right on candidates to be called for the Written Test or Interview. BEL reserves the right to debar/disqualify any candidate at any stage for any reason. BEL reserves the right to cancel, restrict, enlarge, modify or alter the recruitment/selection process at any stage without issuing further notice or assigning reasons. No changes to date/time/venue of the written test or interview will be entertained once a candidate is shortlisted/selected. There will be no separate communication to candidates regarding non-selection at any stage. Only Indian Nationals need apply. Canvassing in any form will result in disqualification. BEL does not demand or charge any fee other than the application fee stated in this advertisement. Candidates are urged not to be misled by fraudsters claiming to represent BEL. BEL will take legal action including criminal action against fraudsters. All revisions/corrigendum, if any, will be hosted on BEL's official website only - candidates should visit regularly.

faq.question: Q1. What is BEL HLS&SCB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: BEL HLS&SCB Recruitment 2026 is a contractual hiring drive by Bharat Electronics Limited's Homeland Security and Smart City Business SBU to fill 56 posts of Field Operation Engineer and Project Engineer-I for project sites in Delhi, Punjab, Uttar Pradesh, and Madhya Pradesh.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in BEL HLS&SCB 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 56 vacancies have been announced: 25 for Field Operation Engineer (FOE) and 31 for Project Engineer-I on a temporary/contractual basis.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to apply for BEL Field Operation Engineer and Project Engineer-I 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for online registration and application submission is 08 June 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the eligibility for BEL FOE and Project Engineer-I 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have ME/M.Tech/BE/B.Tech/B.Sc Engineering (4-year)/MCA in relevant disciplines with 5 years post-qualification experience for FOE and 2 years experience for Project Engineer-I in Networking/Data Centres/Database administration.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for BEL HLS&SCB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Maximum age is 40 years for Field Operation Engineer and 32 years for Project Engineer-I as on 01 June 2026, with age relaxation of 3 years for OBC, 5 years for SC/ST, and 10 years for PwBD.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for BEL FOE & Project Engineer-I 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes Pre-Registered Walk-In Selection with Written Test (85 marks weightage) and Interview (15 marks weightage), followed by document verification and medical fitness check.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for BEL HLS&SCB 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, ₹450 + 18% GST for Field Operation Engineer and ₹400 + 18% GST for Project Engineer-I through SBI Collect, while SC/ST/PwBD candidates are exempted from fee payment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary for BEL Field Operation Engineer and Project Engineer-I 2026?
faq.answer: FOE receives ₹60,000 per month (Year 1) plus ₹20,000/year allowances with ₹5,000 annual increment; Project Engineer-I receives ₹40,000 per month (Year 1) plus ₹12,000/year allowances with ₹5,000 annual increment.

faq.question: Q9. Is BEL HLS&SCB 2026 a permanent job?
faq.answer: No, this is a strictly temporary/contractual engagement for 3 years (extendable to max 5 years for FOE and 4 years for Project Engineer-I) with no guarantee of absorption into regular BEL employment.

faq.question: Q10. How to apply for BEL Field Operation Engineer and Project Engineer-I 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must first pay the application fee through SBI Collect, then register online through the Microsoft Office Form link/QR code available on the BEL careers page from 20 May 2026 to 08 June 2026.
